reviews.review_msg: Inigo is an amazing prof and is so passionate about what he teaches. I dont understand all the hate he recieves, hes an easy marker and the content is very interesting. The only issue I had was he spoke quietly so you really have to listen. He also posts recorded lectures from covid if you need to catch up. I really recommend him as a prof!!

The lecture slides had too many words and pictures with no real descriptions to study off from. The verbal lecture itself was slow and dreary but if you watch the lecture diligently and really STUDY & understand what he is saying you will do good on exams. Exams really tested whether or not you LISTENED to the lecture. Lecture slides do not help

Lectures are the most boring I've ever experienced from a class. Nothing but multiple small figures on each slide, with few (if any) words or explanations. Spends 5-10mins talking about the figures in each slide, says important topics/terms that aren't written anywhere so you have to guess what he's saying. So much unimportant physics and details.
